title: Zigbee
short description: Zigbee is a low-power, low-data-rate, low-latency mesh network, based on the IEEE 802.15.4 LR-WPAN standard. It is commonly used for automation and IoT devices, including sensors, light switches/bulbs, and other wireless-controlled devices.
description: **Zigbee** is a low-power, low-data-rate, low-latency mesh network, based on the IEEE 802.15.4 LR-WPAN standard. It is commonly used for automation and IoT devices, including sensors, light switches/bulbs, and other wireless-controlled devices.
